div.p: Alignment: 32-bit (4-byte) boundaries Total Header Size: 8 Bytes Fixed
sizeof(struct icmp_hdr) = 8 Bytes Total Size: Header(8) + Payload(N)

ol.li: Network Byte Order: All multi-byte integers (Checksum, Identifiers) are Big-Endian.
Checksum Calculation: 16-bit one's complement of the ICMP header and data.
Alignment: ICMP is encapsulated in IP; memory alignment follows IP payload offset.

text.tspan: Error Messages: Original IP Header + 64 bits of Data
